name: revenueRecognition
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.contracts.every(function(c){ return Number.isFinite(c.recognizedRevenue) && Number.isFinite(c.deferredRevenue); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/billing.js, dispatch key 'billing.revenueRecognition'); the /lenses/billing page reaches it via useRunArtifact. ASC-606 deterministic compute (relative-standalone-price allocation + pro-rata schedule), no DB/LLM. MONEY-PATH GUARD (2026-06-27): contract.totalValue, deliverable.standalonePrice and billingSchedule.amount route through `finNum`, so a poisoned 'Infinity'/'1e999'/'NaN'/1e308 collapses to 0 and totalContractValue / totalRecognizedRevenue / totalDeferredRevenue / per-contract recognized+deferred stay FINITE (was fail-OPEN via parseFloat||0 letting Infinity through). Pinned by server/tests/billing-lens-macros.test.js.
